listening_feedback: can understand sentences and frequently used expressions when listening to recordings related to immediately relevant areas.
reading_feedback: can understand sentences and frequently used expressions whne reading texts related to immediately relevant areas.
writing_feedback: can link ideas together in a simple way using basic sentence patterns and sing simple structures correctly, but you make some systematic basic errors.

listening_feedback: can understand the main points of clear standard input when listening to recordings on familiar matters encountered at school, work, leisure, etc.
reading_feedback: can understand the main points of clear standard input when reading texts on familiar matters encountered at school, work, leisure, etc.
writing_feedback: can produce simple connected texts on familiar topics and can express yourself reasonably accurately linking ideas into connected linear sequences.

writing_feedback: can produce a clear detailed text on a wide range of subjects and can explain a viewpoint giving the advantages and disadvantages of various options. You can also use a limited number of cohesive devices to give your written contributions coherence.
